message:
Improve BiDi text handling, table rendering, and layout dep graph

Cross-cutting improvements across text, widget, render, and layout
subsystems:

Text:
- bidi.rs: +76/-76 lines refactoring BiDi text segmentation with
  improved Unicode bidirectional algorithm handling for mixed LTR/RTL
  content — restructured segment boundary detection and embedding
  level resolution
- editor.rs: minor editing behavior adjustment

Layout & render:
- dep_graph.rs: +18/-18 lines improving dependency graph traversal
  ordering and cycle detection
- frame_guardrails.rs: guardrail threshold adjustment
- presenter.rs: presentation layer refinement
- resize_coalescer.rs: coalescing behavior adjustment

Widgets:
- table.rs: +45/-45 lines improving table column rendering with
  better overflow handling and alignment logic
- backdrop_e2e.rs: E2E test adjustments for backdrop component
- doctor.rs: diagnostics update

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
